_note: Illustrative example only. For a real submission, replace this file with your actual dashboard export from Dynatrace (Dashboards app -> ... menu -> Download).

0.content:
# Order Fulfillment
Business observability across the order lifecycle. Set the **environment** variable above.

1.title: Orders by stage (last 24h)
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter isNotNull(order_stage)
| summarize orders = count(), by:{order_stage}
| sort orders desc

2.title: Median time in stage

3.title: Stalled orders (no progress > 1h)
